verdicts.note: Incumbency supports the proven-record direction, but the dossier provides no tenure length, leadership role, or enacted legislative record sufficient for the maximal -2 placement.

The dossier establishes a prior candidacy but does not provide a professional, institutional, or public-service profile. A lack of documented office is not itself evidence for the maximal outsider-renewal pole.

review_notes: All 6 original candidate-axis pairs were reviewed exactly once (1 adjust, 4 upheld, 1 refuted). No additional omitted axis had sufficiently specific dossier support.
